status.description: Status is the remote-sync result status.

base_ref.description: BaseRef is the compared base ref when one is available.

head_ref.description: HeadRef is the compared head ref when one is available.

reason.description: Reason is the human-readable explanation attached to the evidence record.

EvidenceSyncInput.description: EvidenceSyncInput is the JSON input consumed by `harness evidence submit --kind sync`.

title: Sync evidence input
description: JSON input consumed by `harness evidence submit --kind sync`.
